description: Detect outliers in one numeric CSV column by IQR or z-score (+ box/scatter figure).
rules: read-only — input CSV is never mutated
reports outlier indices, values, count, percent, and the lower/upper bounds
JSON report + PNG figure written to record_store
usage: Set DATA_CSV, VALUE_COL, and optionally METHOD ('iqr'|'zscore') + THRESHOLD. Output: outliers.json + outliers.png.
limitation: Single column only; NaNs dropped. Indices are positions within the cleaned column, not original CSV row numbers. Requires numpy/scipy/pandas/matplotlib present; degrades to an empty report otherwise.
